# Substrate

> FOSS-first AI news, deep technical guides, hardware benchmarks, and research breakdowns. No hype, no BS.

## What we are
- **News**: What actually matters in AI — not press releases
- **Guides**: Deep walkthroughs with working code, comparisons, tutorials
- **Benchmarks**: Hardware evals, model shootouts, raw data, reproducible
- **Research**: Papers demystified, explained for senior engineers
- **Opinion**: Based takes, FOSS maximalism, trade-offs, no ads, no affiliate bullshit

## How content is made
Posts are either hand-written in MDX or generated via our research pipeline (DeepSearch → DeepSeek → cited synthesis). Every generated post is reviewed before publish. All sources cited.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://substrate.pub/) — terminal intro + category grid + latest
- [Generate](https://substrate.pub/generate) — AI-powered blog generation with research
- [RSS](https://substrate.pub/rss.xml) — full feed, no ads, no tracking
- [Admin](https://substrate.pub/admin) — pipeline stats + generation history

## Tech
- Static site: Astro + MDX + nginx
- Backend: Substrate inference pipeline (DeepSeek via self-hosted gateway)
- Research: DeepSearchStack (SearXNG → crawl → embed → synthesize)
- Zero JavaScript on reading pages. Zero tracking. Full RSS.
